data: Homemade Apple Crisp: Toss 6 peeled, sliced Granny Smith apples with 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp cinnamon, and 1 tbsp lemon juice. Place in a baking dish. For the topping, mix 1 cup rolled oats, 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, and 1/2 cup cold cubed butter until crumbly. Scatter over apples. Bake at 350F (175C) for 40 minutes until bubbling.
